descriptionSections.descriptionTitle: Steps to Run an AI Model
description: Navigate to the Run AI Model section from the left toolbar.
Select the raster dataset from the 'Select Dataset' dropdown.
Select the model category by choosing either Public or Private.
If Public is selected, all publicly available pre-trained models will be listed in the 'Select Model' dropdown.
If Private is selected, all AI models created by you will be listed in the 'Select Model' dropdown.
Select the required model from the 'Select Model' dropdown.
Now in Run Prediction modal give the layer group name & current date (default selected).
Click on Run to start the AI prediction.
Once processing is complete, the generated output will be available under the Models section in the layer list.
descriptionSections.Note: After clicking Run, you'll receive a notification indicating whether the prediction started or failed. The prediction layer will appear in the Layer List under Model Layers, along with its completion percentage.
